language_note: Norwegian literature at IU Libraries is cataloged under a general Norwegian heading. Note that Nynorsk has its own call number range for literature (PT9025–PT9094), but Nynorsk works may also appear in other categories.

language_note: Old Norse literature includes both Old Icelandic and Old Norwegian texts. These traditions share a common literary heritage and are classified together.

Persian Folk Literature (includes Iran, Tajikistan, Azerbaijan, Afghanistan)

language_note: Persian literature at IU Libraries includes works in Farsi (Iranian Persian), Dari (Afghan Persian), and Tajiki (Tajik Persian). These three are considered varieties of the same literary language. Works in Dari and Tajiki may be classified separately or with in the broader Persian categories. Use IUCAT filters (located in the left sidebar) to refine your search results.
